description: Zorka Design System — since v2.0.0 the visual identity mirrors the official Takeat Design System (Poppins, Takeat red #C8131B, pure neutrals, light-first). Tokens below are verbatim copies of https://raw.githubusercontent.com/takeat-design/UIKIT/main/design-system.json
brandPrinciples: Light-first: main background is white (#FFFFFF) with dark text (neutral.500 #222222); dark mode is derived from neutral.500 — avoid pure black (#000000) in large areas.

One accent only: Takeat red (color.primary.red.500 #C8131B) is the single brand accent — used for CTAs, active states and highlights. Green/blue/yellow are functional (success/info/warning), never decorative.
Typography: Poppins in all weights (400–800), following the Takeat scale Title/Body/Label/Details; headings with tight tracking.
Surfaces: pure neutrals (#F6F6F6, #EDEDED, #C6C6C6, #7A7A7A, #545454, #222222) — no tinted grays; radius scale 4/8/12/16px; shadows from the elevation scale 01–05 (02 is the default).
For TEXT on white use red.500+, yellow.600+, blue.600+ — the 500 steps of yellow/blue fail 4.5:1 contrast on white.
